E-Cell GEC Rewa is the entrepreneurship wing of Government Engineering College Rewa — a launchpad for bold thinkers, creative builders, and future founders.

Startup Ideas
About Us

Fuelling the Startup
Mindset on Campus

E-Cell is more than a club — it's a movement. We bring together students who dare to think differently, providing them with the tools, network, and knowledge to turn their ideas into reality.

From ideation to incubation, we support every stage of your entrepreneurial journey through workshops, mentorship, and real-world challenges.

🚀

Our Mission

To empower students with an entrepreneurial mindset by nurturing innovation, creativity, and leadership. We strive to build a culture where ideas become reality through learning, collaboration, and meaningful opportunities, shaping future entrepreneurs and innovators at GEC Rewa.

🎯

Vision 2025

India's most impactful student startup community

🤝

Our Community

200+ students across all departments & years

What We Do

Programs & Initiatives

Built for every stage of the founder journey.

🏆

PentaQuest

A multi-round entrepreneurial challenge that tests students across five core business skills — strategy, pitching, finance, marketing, and innovation.

🏏

IPL Auction Simulator

A fan-favourite simulation event where participants build and bid for their dream IPL squad, applying real-world budgeting and decision-making under pressure.

🦈

Shark Tank Parody

Students pitch their wildest startup ideas to a panel of "sharks" in this hilarious yet insightful parody of the iconic show — creativity meets business acumen.

💡

Illuminate

An ideas-first event where students present innovative solutions to real-world problems — lighting up conversations about entrepreneurship and social impact.

📚

Workshops

Hands-on sessions on business modelling, product thinking, design, growth hacking, and the startup mindset — led by mentors and industry practitioners.

IPL Auction Simulator

Completed

Step into the shoes of an IPL franchise owner and experience the thrill of a live player auction. Manage your budget, outsmart rival teams, and build a championship-winning squad through smart strategy and bold decisions.

Our Ventures

Startup Showcase

Real ideas, real products — built by E-Cell GEC Rewa students.

1

ElectroKits

Complete DIY kits with all components needed to build functional electronic products — making hardware prototyping easy and accessible for students.

ElectroTech
2

SafarSure

A smart bus tracking device that works even without internet connectivity — giving passengers real-time bus location updates fully offline.

MobilityTech
3

MediBox

An all-in-one portable health monitoring box integrating BP check, ECG machine, oximeter, and glucometer — bringing clinic-grade diagnostics to your doorstep.

HealthTech
4

Smart Helmet

An intelligent safety helmet embedded with sensors for accident detection, SOS alerts, and real-time rider monitoring — making roads safer for two-wheeler riders.

SafetyTech
5

EasyFarm

An agritech solution designed to simplify farming for rural communities — providing smart tools, crop guidance, and resource management to boost agricultural productivity.

AgriTech
